titleStmt.title: SII 39.19: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 19. (A.R. No. 19 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE. MĀṞAVA[RMAN] ALIAS TRIBHUVA[NA CHAKRAVARTIN]-KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA, WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE [ALL] COUNTRIES 38th YEAR [14TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of land for making offerings to the dieity in the same temple, by a person Sandhippiḷḷai alias Viṉāyaga bhagavaṉ, the resident of Kaḻanivāyiḻ a hamlet of Maṟittulagaṅgātta Pāṇḍyapuram in Maṟittulangaṅgātta Pāṇḍya Vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟupaṉrāṉa tiripuvaṉaccak
karavattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya kula
cekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 8vatu pruścika nāyaṟṟu triyo
daśiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ tirutti
yūr ccaṉṉavanattu Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉa
vaṉa muṭaiyāṟku maṟittulakaṅkātta pāṇṭiyava
ḷanāṭṭu maṟittulakaṅkātta pāṇṭiyapurattu kaḻani
vāyiluṭaiyāṉ naṅkaṉ cattippiḷḷaiyāṉa viṉāya
ka ṉṉa Inṉāyaṉār tiruvaiykā t tirunāḷukku mu
taliyār tirukkāp Eḻuntaruḷavum Amutupaṭi cā
ttuppaṭi Uḷḷi lañcerip paṟṟil
kuruntanku Añcāta perumāḷukku Iṟai
yiliyāy Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku kaṭamaiyiṟuppāy nāḷ vilai
koṇṭa pi vayakkal kuṭimuḻutum Uppāṟṟil nā
Ittirukkāppu nāḷ Eṉ taṉmamāka Eḻun
taruḷa ṉṉilam candrādityavaṟ celvatāka nirum vā
ttu kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Ippaṭi
kku naṅkaṉ cattippiḷḷaiyāṉa viṉāyakapakavaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku śrī māheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
